Item Class: Wands
Rarity: Rare
Bramble Needle
Withered Wand

Requirements:
Level: 26
Int: 55
--------
Item Level: 37
Sockets: S
--------
25% increased Spell Damage (rune)
{ Prefix Modifier "Apprentice's" (Tier: 8) — Damage, Caster }
30(25-34)% increased Spell Damage
{ Prefix Modifier "Chaotic" (Tier: 5) — Chaos, Caster }
18% increased Chaos Damage
{ Prefix Modifier "Scholar's" (Tier: 6) — Mana }
+45 to maximum Mana
{ Suffix Modifier "of Anarchy" (Tier: 5) — Chaos, Caster, Gem }
+1 to Level of all Chaos Spell Skills
{ Suffix Modifier "of Aptitude" (Tier: 7) — Attribute }
+20 to Intelligence
{ Suffix Modifier "of Shaping" (Tier: 8) — Caster }
9% increased Cast Speed
